user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] System detected Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected for account Wide World Importers. Generating output.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 08:24 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
To: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 13:22 EST
Subject: Re: account health Discussion - Next Steps

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with account health. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Ryan Kowalski <ryan.kowalski@wideworldimp.com>
To: Ahmed Hassan <ahmed.hassan@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 12:39 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: account health Discussion - Wide World Importers
Date: 2024-02-13
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers), Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is account health.

[00:08:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:12:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is integration complexity.

[00:16:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

[00:25:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:30:00] Ahmed Hassan (Microsoft): On the account health front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around technical validation.

[00:34:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:36:00] Ryan Kowalski (Wide World Importers): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?
